name: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTG Pactual Renta Residencial Fund
summary: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTG Pactual Renta Residencial Fund is a residential real estate income fund. It is managed by BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos and focuses on generating returns through investments in income-producing residential real estate properties.
